title: anthistiria arguens f. japonica
intro: Anthistiria arguens f. japonica, also known as Japanese Bentgrass, is a perennial grass native to East Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant has been found to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating digestive issues, and treating skin conditions. In traditional herbal preparations, Japanese Bentgrass is often used to make infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are used to treat a range of health conditions.
